basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has published the Technical Fellow Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Technical Fellow position. Candidates up to 30 years of age and holding an M.V.Sc. in any discipline are eligible to attend the walk-in interview, with M.V.Sc. in Meat Science/Livestock Products Technology being desirable. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and walk-in details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: The upper age limit is 5 years in case of women/ SC/ST/OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: M.V.Sc. in any discipline, M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology (desirable)
qualification.details: M.V.Sc. in any discipline. M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology (desirable).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 1st and 2nd year) and Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 3rd year)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.tamil_nadu_veterinary_and_animal_science: M.V.Sc. in any discipline, M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology (desirable)

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TANUVAS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TANUVAS Technical Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.V.Sc. in any discipline. M.V.Sc in Meat Science / Livestock Products Technology (desirable).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: The upper age limit is 5 years in case of women/ SC/ST/OBC.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 1st and 2nd year) and Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (for 3rd year)

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Technical Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for TANUVAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Technical Fellow. This is a contractual position offered by the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Technical Fellow position in the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this TANUVAS job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.V.Sc. in any discipline. An M.V.Sc. in Meat Science or Livestock Products Technology is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Technical Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Technical Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, along with HRA, depending on the year of service.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q9. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Technical Fellow position is scheduled to be held on 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview for TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 to be held?
faq.answer: The exact venue for the Walk-in Interview will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for precise location details.
